tasks.subject: Task 1: Add 80m wind metrics
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add WIND_SPEED_80M and WIND_DIR_80M to the Metric enum.

**Files:** src/smoke_sense/data.py, tests/test_metric.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/data.py", "tests/test_metric.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_metric.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["WIND_SPEED_80M value/unit/has_aqi", "WIND_DIR_80M value/unit/has_aqi", "label lookup + not in AQI_METRICS"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: HRRR provider core
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure helpers + HRRRProvider.fetch with injectable fake field source; register provider. Unit-tested, no network/ecCodes.

**Files:** src/smoke_sense/providers/hrrr.py, src/smoke_sense/providers/__init__.py, tests/test_providers_hrrr.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/providers/hrrr.py", "src/smoke_sense/providers/__init__.py", "tests/test_providers_hrrr.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pure helpers correct", "registry no-creds hrrr", "fetch canonical chunks + subset + skip", "lazy herbie import keeps suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Herbie dependency + real-source verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add GRIB stack and verify HerbieFieldSource against a real past cycle, fixing xarray glue if needed.

**Files:** pyproject.toml, uv.lock, src/smoke_sense/providers/hrrr.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pyproject.toml", "uv.lock", "src/smoke_sense/providers/hrrr.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["deps added", "suite green", "real fetch verified or env limitation documented"]}
```
